summary: File upload fix verification complete. Backend upload endpoints (/api/upload/video, /api/upload/audio, /api/upload/image) all return proper server URLs (not blob URLs). Frontend code correctly uploads files to server and stores permanent URLs. Old creatives with blob URLs show expected 'session expired' fallback UI. New creatives will use server URLs and persist across sessions.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/upload/video endpoint correctly saves files to /app/backend/uploads/ and returns server URL like https://...preview.emergentagent.com/api/uploads/video_xxx.mp4
Backend /api/upload/audio endpoint correctly saves audio files with audio_ prefix
Backend /api/upload/image endpoint correctly saves image files
Frontend uploadVideo(), uploadAudio(), uploadImage() functions in api.js correctly call the backend upload endpoints
Frontend CreativeEditor.jsx handleVideoUpload(), handleAudioUpload(), handleCompanionUpload() functions correctly store the server URL returned from upload
Creatives.jsx has proper isValidUrl() helper that detects blob URLs as invalid and shows appropriate fallback UI
Old creatives in database still have blob URLs - this is expected, they need to be re-created to use server URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload fix is verified. Old creatives ('Latest Video', 'Latest Audio') still have blob URLs in database from before the fix - these show 'session expired' which is expected. New creatives created through the UI will use proper server URLs and work after page refresh.

video_upload_endpoint.description: /api/upload/video endpoint returns server URL, not blob URL
video_upload_endpoint.evidence: Backend test test_video_upload_returns_server_url passed - URL contains /api/uploads/ and starts with video_

audio_upload_endpoint.description: /api/upload/audio endpoint returns server URL, not blob URL
audio_upload_endpoint.evidence: Backend test test_audio_upload_returns_server_url passed - URL contains /api/uploads/ and starts with audio_

image_upload_endpoint.description: /api/upload/image endpoint returns server URL, not blob URL

uploaded_files_accessible.evidence: Backend test test_uploaded_files_accessible and test_existing_audio_files_accessible passed

video_creative_stores_server_url.description: Creating a video creative stores server URL from upload response

audio_creative_stores_server_url.description: Creating an audio creative stores server URL from upload response

frontend_video_form.description: Video creative form shows VAST Tag and RAW Video Upload options with Upload Video File button
frontend_video_form.evidence: Screenshot shows Video Ad Settings with source type selection and Upload Video File button

frontend_audio_form.description: Audio creative form shows Audio VAST Tag and Upload Audio options with Upload Audio File button
frontend_audio_form.evidence: Screenshot shows Audio Settings with source type selection, Upload Audio File button, and Companion Banner section

blob_url_fallback_ui.description: Old creatives with blob URLs show proper fallback UI
blob_url_fallback_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Video unavailable - The video file session has expired - Re-upload the video to preview'

note_on_old_data: The 'Latest Video' and 'Latest Audio' creatives still have blob URLs stored in MongoDB from before the fix. This is expected - they show the 'session expired' fallback UI. To make them work, users need to delete and recreate these creatives using the new upload flow.
